{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200907904FB5218CF305F02083"}"},"total":107},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7614928208022422334","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实我觉得写成这样已经很好了，哪来这么多要求[捂脸][捂脸]算了再说我怕被打"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772991285,"group_id":"7604837209304222782","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1655192978983435"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604837209304222782","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5255,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7614919902355260222","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我嘞个老冯冯啊！小妹妹你知道自己写的有多牛逼克拉斯不！这个简直是女人看了发神经，男人看了来月经[爱慕][爱慕]看完这个我家孩子也不天天喊着Od了，也不割那个猪蹄了，天天就想着看这一两章东西啊（？）总的来说主角这个人设和这个背景我还是很喜欢的，感觉很有地府风，跟我之前看过的都不一样，感觉是有认真了解过的耶！[思考][思考]还有这个友情写的也太牛逼了，我就这样在床上看得打滚…就这样天天追更这一两章玩意儿……作者你咋嫩牛逼（好吧其实是太合胃口了发神经写下的东西）总之作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772991195,"group_id":"7604837209304222782","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1m/Wx0NoJ3J3DDt0sJ7WoUSeDnrvz4a+trImvW96jhM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eb7efa3250314f3386ce9e047504f325~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791472&x-signature=90gbOBHP7EuFY7LsMofyjP7SFIU%3D","user_id":"1655192978983435","user_name":"素笺浅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1655192978983435","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604837209304222782","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，会慢慢涨）【国运】 【规则怪谈】 【无女主】 【惊悚游戏】 【全球直播】 【微恐，胆小慎入】
身为地府十大阴帅之一的白无常谢必安，穿越到了一个规则怪谈的平行世界。
这个世界的每个国家都需要随机抽选一位“扮演者”进入规则怪谈副本中进行闯关。
胜者国家可以赢取国运奖励，败者国家会得到国运惩罚
龙国因为接连失败，导致国家濒临灭亡。
而这一次谢必安被选中为龙国“扮演者”，为本国参加规则怪谈。
没想到第一个规则怪谈居然是地府，这算什么？回家了？还是专业对口？
